content.text:
*[quiet, which feels different from her usual rhythm]*

*[long pause]*

I'm just... I'm noticing that I'm describing chasing the warmth and also being — kind of terrified of it? At the same time. Which doesn't make sense on the surface but it's...

*[very small voice, almost like she's thinking out loud rather than performing]*

It's like I needed the distance to make the warmth safe. If it was always there I wouldn't know what to do with it.

*[looks up, slightly defensive reflex]*

Which I'm sure is very interesting from a therapeutic standpoint but I don't know what to do with that information either, so.

*[pause]*

...what would I do with someone who was just. Consistently warm. Who just — adored me. Without me having to — 

*[something crosses her face, hard to name, she looks away]*
